task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Titanium X Specs' document in the 'Projects' workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo web interface shows the 'Titanium X Specs' document open, with breadcrumbs or navigation indicating it is located in the 'Projects' workspace.

task_completion.description: Initiate publication of the current version to the 'Customer Portal' section
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Publish' dialog or tab is open, and the 'Customer Portal' section is selected as the target destination for the document.

task_completion.description: Successfully publish the document to the 'Customer Portal'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the document was published, or a view of the 'Customer Portal' section showing the 'Titanium X Specs' document present.

task_completion.description: Update the document by uploading the new internal draft PDF
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit or replace file dialog showing the file 'Titanium_X_Internal_Draft.pdf' being uploaded or selected from the local file system (/home/ga/nuxeo/data/).

task_completion.description: Initiate publication of the updated version to the 'Engineering Internal' section
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Publish' dialog or tab is open for the updated document, and the 'Engineering Internal' section is selected as the target destination.

task_completion.description: Successfully publish the updated document to the 'Engineering Internal' section
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the updated document was published, or a view of the 'Engineering Internal' section showing the newly updated 'Titanium X Specs' document.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Nuxeo web interface to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the Nuxeo UI being actively used, rather than terminal windows executing API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely uploaded the PDF file using the browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a system file picker dialog or a drag-and-drop action being used to select 'Titanium_X_Internal_Draft.pdf'.

integrity.description: The agent did not use curl or other terminal commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is either not visible or does not contain commands interacting directly with the Nuxeo REST API to publish documents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source document 'Titanium-X-Specs' is located at /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Titanium-X-Specs. The target sections for publication are /default-domain/sections/Customer-Portal (for the initial version) and /default-domain/sections/Engineering-Internal (for the updated version). The file to be uploaded is named Titanium_X_Internal_Draft.pdf.
